ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT THE MUNI TRAIN DOORS WERE A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF PUBLIC PROPERTY. DEFENDANT MAY PROPOUND ADDITIONAL DISCOVERY, AND BRING SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion for Summary Judgment. Courtney M. Cassinelli, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 576-1500; appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Meredith B. Osborn, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3911, appearing for Defendant, CCSF and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary adjudication is granted. Plaintiff fails to raise a triable issue of fact that the MUNI train doors were a dangerous condition of public property. Defendant may propound additional discovery, and bring Summary Judgment Motion. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR 2647

Motion For Leave Of Court To File A First Amended Complaint Ccp 473, 576; Crc 327
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SHEILA MULLEN'S Motion for Leave of Court to File a First Amended Complaint, CCP sections 473, 576; and, CRC 327. Courtney M. Cassinelli, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 576-1500; appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Meredith B. Osborn, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3911, appearing for Defendant CCSF and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's motion to file amended complaint is granted. Plaintiff inadvertently failed to plead negligence. Insufficient demonstration of prejudice to defendant. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR 2647

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to March 13, 2009, per agreement of the parties. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
